subject: [RFC PATCH v4 06/27] mm/mlock: skip mlock for managed-memory folios

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: The patch author has not posted any follow-up replies to address concerns or suggestions from other reviewers.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series proposes to skip mlock operations for folios managed by device drivers, extending the existing check in mm/mlock.c to handle private nodes.
